text.title: AI Content Quality Review Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the AI Content Quality Review methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Draft has ≥3 named entities per 100 words (people, products, places, dates). Below floor = 'AI-slop' signature.
rule.rationale: Draft has ≥3 named entities per 100 words (people, products, places, dates). Below floor = 'AI-slop' signature.

rule.statement: ≥1 citation per major claim; ≥4 total for ≥1000-word piece. Citations link to primary sources, not LLM hallucinations.
rule.rationale: ≥1 citation per major claim; ≥4 total for ≥1000-word piece. Citations link to primary sources, not LLM hallucinations.

rule.statement: Draft contains ≥1 original observation traceable to founder's research notes or build log. Pure synthesis = no original POV.
rule.rationale: Draft contains ≥1 original observation traceable to founder's research notes or build log. Pure synthesis = no original POV.

rule.statement: Intro ≤120 words OR ≤20% of total. Generic 'in today's world' padding = intro tax violation.
rule.rationale: Intro ≤120 words OR ≤20% of total. Generic 'in today's world' padding = intro tax violation.

rule.statement: Every statistic carries a citation to a primary source. Unattributed numbers fail; LLM-fabricated stats are common.
rule.rationale: Every statistic carries a citation to a primary source. Unattributed numbers fail; LLM-fabricated stats are common.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-ai-content-quality-review.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
